headline: Target's turnaround plan is finally taking shape
summary: About three-quarters of Americans live within 10 miles of a Target. But despite that proximity, the big box store has been struggling to attract shoppers. In the second half of 2025, foot traffic at Target’s 2,000 U.S. locations declined in every month except October, recent Placer.ai data shows. ...
